fileTabs.content: SELECT /*+ parallel(C) parallel(P) use_hash(C P) */         DISTINCT C.CLID,         P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER FROM         CLIENT_ALIAS C,         WORK_CARDS_ORIG_STAGING P WHERE         ltrim(rtrim(C.SOURCE_CLIENT_REF(+))) = ltrim(rtrim(P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER)) AND     C.ETO (+) IS NULL AND     C.SOURCE_TYPE (+) = 0 AND     C.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE (+) = 'U' AND     C.CLASS (+) = '585' AND     P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL

expression.expression: (SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))
